definitions: 虚幻的；不真实的；只是表面上的（illusory）

examples.text: 48. Why does the author say “witnessing companies...feels particularly irritating” (Lines 2-4, Para. 6)? A) The UK digital divide would further worsen due to the metaverse. B) The concept of the metaverse is believed to be still quite illusory.
examples.explanation: 这里的 illusory 用来形容 the concept of the metaverse，意思是“虚幻的、不够真实可信的”。整句表示：人们认为“元宇宙”这个概念目前仍然比较空泛，像一种尚未真正落地的想象。
